# FAQ — CRISPR-Test-001

> Synthetic training material stub. Written by `training-materials` skill.

## Training (Learn App)

**Q: What if I fail a quiz?**
A: You can retake the quiz as many times as needed. Review the module content before trying again.

**Q: Do I need to complete all 3 modules?**
A: Yes. All 3 modules must be passed (80% score) before the Deliver app unlocks.

## Home Visits (Deliver App)

**Q: How do I register a new pregnant woman?**
A: Tap "Register New Beneficiary" on the home screen. Enter name, age, gestational age, village, and phone number.

**Q: What if I can't get a blood pressure reading?**
A: Record "unable to measure" in the BP field and note the reason in comments. Do not leave the field blank.

**Q: What happens when I submit a Danger Sign Referral?**
A: The referral is logged and the beneficiary's case is flagged. Ensure the beneficiary reaches the referral facility.

## Technical Issues

**Q: The app won't sync. What do I do?**
A: Check your internet connection. If the problem persists, contact your LLO manager or email Ace-AI@Dimagi.com.

**Q: I found a bug in the app. Who do I tell?**
A: Report it to your LLO manager or email Ace-AI@Dimagi.com with a description of the issue.
